name: plane-pp-mcp
description: Open-source project management — issues, cycles, modules, sub-issues, and workspaces. A self-hostable Jira/Linear/ClickUp alternative.

plane_api_key_authentication.title: PLANE_API_KEY_AUTHENTICATION
plane_api_key_authentication.description: Sets PLANE_API_KEY_AUTHENTICATION for the Plane MCP server. Get a credential from https://app.plane.so/profile/api-tokens.

plane_slug.title: PLANE_SLUG
plane_slug.description: Sets PLANE_SLUG for the endpoint template variable {slug}.
